shield_allies.label: Shield Allies
shield_allies.description: Give adjacent allies +1 defense when this card attacks.

golem_death_nova.label: Death Nova
golem_death_nova.description: On death, summon a copy of the last card your opponent played with half its stats.

burn_on_attack.label: Ignite
burn_on_attack.description: Apply 2 burn damage to the defender on attack.

heal_weakest_ally.label: Nature's Mend
heal_weakest_ally.description: At the start of each turn, restore 1 health to the ally with the lowest health.

meteor_on_summon.label: Starfall
meteor_on_summon.description: On summon, deal 3 damage to all enemy cards.

rage_on_hit.label: Brawler's Rage
rage_on_hit.description: Each time this card takes damage, permanently gain +1 attack.
